description: Lightning-fast, zero-dependency TypeScript toolkit focusing on an Isomorphic HTTP client and advanced Async utilities (retry, parallel, debounce). Features native Zod/Valibot validation and OpenAPI type generation.

features.api_client: Isomorphic fetch wrapper with interceptors, circuit breakers, and native schema validation (Zod/Valibot)
features.async_toolkit: High-performance retry logic with backoff, concurrency control, and debounce/throttle utilities
features.http_helpers: UrlSlug and QueryString helpers for robust URL manipulation and parameter handling
features.cli_automation: Type-safe CLI for generating TypeScript interfaces from Swagger/OpenAPI 3.0+ specifications
features.reliability: Built-in ErrorBoundary and Logger for structured monitoring and graceful failure recovery
